name: Tempt-me Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Gradually add powdered sugar to the softened cream cheese, mixing well after each addition.
2. Add melted unsweetened chocolate and vanilla; mix thoroughly.
3. Chill mixture for several hours.
4. Shape into 1-inch balls and roll in chopped toasted almonds, cocoa powder, or additional powdered sugar.
5. Chill before serving. Makes 4 dozen.
